title: Yosys not removing DFF with constant input and replacing with a constant driver.
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.34+43 (git sha1 d21c464ae, gcc 9.4.0-1ubuntu1~20.04.2 -fPIC -Os)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

- I have an rv32i cpu core design in verilog which I am trying to synthesize using Yosys targeting the sky130 library.
- For ease of doing gate level simulation, I am currently hard-coding the instructions for the test program.
- The synthesis commands used in Yosys is given below:
- (Required files are attached at the end of the below section)

```
read_liberty -lib ./lib/sky130_fd_sc_hd__tt_025C_1v80.lib

read_verilog ./riscv_pipelined_Final.v

hierarchy -check -top riscv_core
synth -top riscv_core
stat

dfflibmap -liberty ./lib/sky130_fd_sc_hd__tt_025C_1v80.lib
opt
stat

abc -liberty ./lib/sky130_fd_sc_hd__tt_025C_1v80.lib -script +strash;scorr;ifraig;retime,{D};strash;dch,-f;map,-M,1,{D}
flatten
setundef -undriven -init -zero
opt_clean -purge
rename -enumerate
stat
write_verilog -noattr ./synth/riscv_pipelined_Final_netlist.v
```

### Expected Behavior

- DFF with constant input are reducible to a sequential constant, but it seems like Yosys is not removing some of the DFF with constant inputs in the design and replacing them with constant drivers.


### Actual Behavior

- While I was doing basic checks of the synthesis output netlist, I found that there are three DFF instances that have a constant input of 1'h0.
![DFF_with_constant_inputs](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/assets/79094513/b6897f95-558f-46e1-b1b5-db30b53c46ad)

- In the ABC result, I can see that there are three **_const0_** cells (which I believe must correspond to the above three DFF instances
![ABC_Results_const0](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/assets/79094513/d9cdf1a8-87aa-4e99-94ec-de2c0aaeed7d)


- I even tried adding another **opt** command  (which should by default run **opt_dff**) after the **abc** command, but these 3 DFF instances with constant input are kept as is.

- Please find attached the following:
   - Zip file with all files to repro the issue: [yosys_issue_4266.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/14528891/yosys_issue_4266.zip)

 - For taking a quick look, attaching some of the files directly here:
   - Yosys log file: [yosys_synthesis_log.log](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/14522803/yosys_synthesis_log.log)
   - The generated netlist: [riscv_pipelined_Final_netlist.txt](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/14522823/riscv_pipelined_Final_netlist.txt)
   - Source RTL: [riscv_pipelined_Final.txt](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/14522827/riscv_pipelined_Final.txt)
   - Sky130 Lib file: [sky130_fd_sc_hd__tt_025C_1v80.lib.txt](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/14522869/sky130_fd_sc_hd__tt_025C_1v80.lib.txt)
